sp_browser_auth.title: SP Services Login (Optional)
sp_browser_auth.description:
To enable household electricity and water usage sensors, log in to SP Services:

1. Open this URL in your browser: `{auth_url}`
2. Complete the login and any MFA steps.
3. After the page loads (it may show an error — that's fine), copy the **full URL** from the browser address bar.
4. Paste it in the field below.

Leave the field empty to skip SP Services login.

reauth_browser_auth.title: Re-authenticate SP Services
reauth_browser_auth.description:
Your SP Services session has expired. Log in again:

1. Open this URL in your browser: `{auth_url}`
2. Complete the login and any MFA steps.
3. Copy the **full URL** from the browser address bar after login.
4. Paste it below.

error.name_too_long: Name must be 64 characters or fewer.
error.sp_cannot_connect: Could not connect to SP Services. Check your network and try again.
error.sp_invalid_callback: Could not exchange the callback URL for a token. Make sure you copied the full URL from the browser address bar after logging in.
